case_title: GUILHERME ROSIN VS. AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROSIN, GUILHERME AS TO DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH

ORDER DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
